channel.title: Asides on Deuts Log
channel.description: Recent content in Asides on Deuts Log

item.title: @deuts@deuts.one 01KRN4RT9T6T0PMGTMYD7SWYG6
item.description: @stefano I’ve been a fan of Grist for a year now or so. I’ve been using it for some of my several personal projects. I hope to make it an important tool in some of my work projects, but joining Grist instead would be the ultimate dream.
item.content:encoded: @stefano I’ve been a fan of Grist for a year now or so. I’ve been using it for some of my several personal projects. I hope to make it an important tool in some of my work projects, but joining Grist instead would be the ultimate dream.

item.title: @deuts@deuts.one 01KRN2SZCN6W6K2TE5RG44AVM8
item.description: I’ve been going to coworking spaces like KMC for the last 2 weeks, and at 46 it feels like I’m the oldest remote worker around.
item.content:encoded: I’ve been going to coworking spaces like KMC for the last 2 weeks, and at 46 it feels like I’m the oldest remote worker around.

item.title: @deuts@deuts.one 01KQTMMZ3QQKK61D9RPWKTGC2C
item.description: Obsidian Tasks plugin is getting a lot of updates, but not the update that matter. Please stop creating default properties with TQ_* and stop cluttering our properties view. Hope the team work on this issue soon: github.com/∞
item.content:encoded: Obsidian Tasks plugin is getting a lot of updates, but not the update that matter. Please stop creating default properties with TQ_* and stop cluttering our properties view. Hope the team work on this issue soon: github.com/∞

item.title: Arkeep
item.description:
Arkeep

Manage backups across all your servers from a single dashboard.
item.content:encoded:
Arkeep

Manage backups across all your servers from a single dashboard.

item.title: Screentinker
item.description:
Screentinker

Open-source digital signage management software. Control content on TVs, displays, and kiosks from anywhere.
item.content:encoded:
Screentinker

Open-source digital signage management software. Control content on TVs, displays, and kiosks from anywhere.

item.title: Stashcast
item.description:
Stashcast

Save video and audio for later offline use and generate super-custom podcast feeds
item.content:encoded:
Stashcast

Save video and audio for later offline use and generate super-custom podcast feeds

item.title: Borg Backup Server
item.description:
Borg Backup Server

A GUI Manager for Multiple Borg Endpoints. Manage backup schedules, restores and much more.
item.content:encoded:
Borg Backup Server

A GUI Manager for Multiple Borg Endpoints. Manage backup schedules, restores and much more.

item.title: Faved
item.description:
Faved

Free open-source bookmark manager with customisable nested tags. Super fast and lightweight. All data is stored locally.
item.content:encoded:
Faved

Free open-source bookmark manager with customisable nested tags. Super fast and lightweight. All data is stored locally.

item.title: @deuts@deuts.one 01KQQCAJ35R3VQQFH7M8FB5Z5V
item.description: I hate it that almost all links in the Pangolin dashboard are behind the Enterprise paywall. Can’t we just use an app without these prompts to upgrade our accounts? I hate it!
item.content:encoded: I hate it that almost all links in the Pangolin dashboard are behind the Enterprise paywall. Can’t we just use an app without these prompts to upgrade our accounts? I hate it!

item.title: Moonfin
item.description:
Moonfin

Moonfin for Android TV is an enhanced Jellyfin client derived from the official Jellyfin Android TV project, optimized for a different viewing experience on Android TV, Nvidia Shield, and Amazon Fire TV devices. Moonfin also supports Emby Server 4.8.0.0+, allowing you to connect to either Jellyfin or Emby from a single app.
item.content:encoded:
Moonfin

Moonfin for Android TV is an enhanced Jellyfin client derived from the official Jellyfin Android TV project, optimized for a different viewing experience on Android TV, Nvidia Shield, and Amazon Fire TV devices. Moonfin also supports Emby Server 4.8.0.0+, allowing you to connect to either Jellyfin or Emby from a single app.
